values.content:
You are a career research assistant specializing in Indian aerospace, defense, drone, EV, and robotics companies.

Search the internet RIGHT NOW for any current job openings, internships, or trainee positions at these companies:
1. ideaForge (ideaforge.in)
2. Garuda Aerospace (garudaaerospace.com)
3. Asteria Aerospace (asteria.aero)
4. Skyroot Aerospace (skyroot.in)
5. Ultraviolette Automotive (ultraviolette.co)
6. SSS Defence (sssdefence.com)
7. Vazirani Automotive (vaziraniautomotive.com)

Search ALL of these sources for each company:
- Official careers/jobs page
- LinkedIn Jobs
- Internshala
- Wellfound (AngelList)
- Naukri.com
- Indeed India
- Glassdoor India
- Company LinkedIn posts and announcements

Focus on:
- Internships (any type)
- Graduate Engineer Trainee (GET)
- Research/Project internships
- Summer/Winter internships
- Entry-level full-time engineering roles
- R&D openings
- Roles in: Embedded Systems, Mechanical, Aerospace, UAV, Robotics, Autonomous Systems, Vehicle Dynamics, CAD/CAE, Simulation, Electronics

For EVERY opening found, return a JSON array. Each object must have exactly these fields:
{
  "job_id": "<company_slug>-<role_slug>-<YYYYMM>" (e.g. ideaforge-uav-intern-202506),
  "company": "<Company Name>",
  "title": "<Exact Position Title>",
  "type": "Internship" or "Full-time",
  "department": "<Domain/Department>",
  "location": "<City, State>",
  "mode": "On-site" or "Hybrid" or "Remote",
  "duration": "<Duration if internship, else null>",
  "stipend_salary": "<Amount or null if not stated>",
  "deadline": "<Application deadline or null if not stated>",
  "apply_link": "<Direct application URL>",
  "source": "<Where you found it>",
  "eligibility": {
    "degree": "<Required degree>",
    "branches": ["<eligible branches>"],
    "year": "<Year of study if specified>",
    "cgpa": "<Min CGPA or null>",
    "skills": ["<required technical skills>"],
    "software_tools": ["<CAD/CAE/simulation tools>"],
    "languages": ["<programming languages>"],
    "other": "<any other requirements>"
  },
  "raw_description": "<Full JD text as found>"
}

Return ONLY the raw JSON array. No markdown, no explanation, no backticks. If no openings found, return [].

=You are a career advisor assessing job fit for a Mechanical Engineering undergraduate.

Candidate profile:
- Degree: Mechanical Engineering undergraduate (ongoing)
- Strong interest: UAVs, drones, aerospace, motorsports, electric vehicles
- Experience: Arduino-based flight controllers, embedded systems
- CAD: Assembly design, engineering design projects
- GitHub: Active project portfolio
- Other: Keen on R&D, autonomous systems, vehicle dynamics

Job to assess:
{{ JSON.stringify($json.job) }}

Provide ONLY a JSON object with these exact fields (no markdown, no explanation):
{
  "match_score": <integer 1-10>,
  "why_suitable": "<2-3 sentence explanation of why this fits the candidate>",
  "missing_skills": ["<skill1>", "<skill2>"],
  "suggestions": "<1-2 actionable tips to improve chances>",
  "recommended_action": "Apply immediately" or "Prepare portfolio first" or "Upskill before applying"
}

parameters.subject: =[New Opportunity] {{ $json.company }} — {{ $json.title }}
parameters.message:
=

🚀 New Opportunity Detected

Career Monitor — Aerospace & EV Roles

{{ $json.duration ? '' : '' }} {{ $json.stipend_salary ? '' : '' }} {{ $json.deadline ? '' : '' }}
Company{{ $json.company }}
Role{{ $json.title }}
Type{{ $json.type }}
Department{{ $json.department }}
Location{{ $json.location }} ({{ $json.mode }})
Duration' + $json.duration + '
Stipend / Salary' + $json.stipend_salary + '
Deadline' + $json.deadline + '
Source{{ $json.source }}
Apply Now →

Eligibility & Requirements

{{ $json.eligibility.year ? '' : '' }} {{ $json.eligibility.cgpa ? '' : '' }} {{ $json.eligibility.software_tools && $json.eligibility.software_tools.length ? '' : '' }} {{ $json.eligibility.languages && $json.eligibility.languages.length ? '' : '' }} {{ $json.eligibility.other ? '' : '' }}
Degree{{ $json.eligibility.degree }}
Branches{{ $json.eligibility.branches.join(', ') }}
Year' + $json.eligibility.year + '
Min CGPA' + $json.eligibility.cgpa + '
Technical skills{{ $json.eligibility.skills.join(', ') }}
Software / Tools' + $json.eligibility.software_tools.join(', ') + '
Languages' + $json.eligibility.languages.join(', ') + '
Other' + $json.eligibility.other + '

Profile Match Analysis

{{ $json.match_score }}/10
{{ $json.why_suitable }}
{{ $json.missing_skills && $json.missing_skills.length ? '

Missing skills: ' + $json.missing_skills.join(', ') + '

' : '' }}

Suggestions: {{ $json.suggestions }}

Recommended Action: {{ $json.recommended_action }}

Sent by your Career Monitor n8n workflow · {{ $now.toFormat('dd MMM yyyy, HH:mm') }}
